# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

```yaml
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.stripe.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-auth-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - auth0.com
      - "*.auth0.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth0.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.5/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.5
    ports:
      tcp-postgres: 5432
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.10/32
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: MONGO
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.10
    ports:
      tcp-mongo: 27017
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mongodb.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 27017
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.15/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.15
    ports:
      tcp-redis: 6379
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 6379
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - s3.amazonaws.com
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
      - s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-sendgrid-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.sendgrid.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-sendgrid-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.sendgrid.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.sendgrid.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-twilio-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-twilio-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 8s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.20/32
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.20
    ports:
      http: 9200
      tcp: 9300
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
    timeout: 60s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9200
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9300
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9300
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.25/32
  ports:
  - number: 9092
    name: tcp-kafka
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.25
    ports:
      tcp-kafka: 9092
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9092
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kafka.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9092
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---

kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-slack-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - slack.com
  - "*.slack.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-slack-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - slack.com
  - "*.slack.com"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: slack.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  - googleapis.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  - googleapis.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.googleapis.com"
      - googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-datadog-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-datadog-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.datadoghq.com
        port:
          number: 443
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.30/32
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.240.0.30
    ports:
      tcp-mysql: 3306
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port
